title: com.para.post
summary: Primary Para post record with rich text, replies, embeds, flairs, and post type metadata.

title: com.para.social.postMeta
summary: Metadata overlay for Para posts including post type, vote score, and civic classification tags.

title: com.para.community.defs
summary: Shared community governance views for moderators, officials, deputies, summaries, and history.

title: com.para.community.getGovernance
summary: Governance query for community rosters, summaries, metadata, and edit history.

title: com.para.actor.defs
summary: Actor-facing status and profile-stat definitions for influence, contributions, community activity, and public status.

title: com.para.actor.getProfileStats
summary: Actor query for Para-specific profile statistics and current public status.

title: com.para.civic.defs
summary: Indexed civic views for cabildeos, positions, vote totals, and viewer context.

title: com.para.civic.getCabildeo
summary: Detail query for a single indexed cabildeo with aggregate and viewer context fields.

title: com.para.civic.listCabildeos
summary: List query for indexed cabildeos with filters and pagination.

title: com.para.highlight.defs
summary: Indexed highlight annotation views for public and private political reading layers.

title: com.para.highlight.listHighlights
summary: List query for indexed highlight annotations with filters and pagination.

title: com.para.status
summary: Literal-self status record for the current public status, party, and community label of a Para account.

title: com.para.identity.defs
summary: Core identity definitions for personas, verification status, device trust, and anonymous credentials.

title: com.para.identity.grant
summary: Consent grant record for third-party access to identity data and actions.

title: com.para.identity.proof
summary: Zero-knowledge or INE verification proof record attesting to citizen attributes without revealing identity data.
